title: Blackspur Wall Anchor Set, Plastic Fixing Plugs, Indoor & Outdoor, Strong and Durable, Wall Plugs for Home, Workshop & Professional Use, 100pcs
features: 100-PIECE SET FOR ALL FIXING NEEDS: Includes 100 heavy-duty wall plugs in assorted sizes, designed to fit a wide variety of screws and applications. Perfect for securely mounting shelves, picture frames, curtain rods, mirrors, cabinets, and wall décor. Whether you’re tackling small household fixes or professional installation tasks, this versatile anchor set ensures you always have the right size and strength for the job

STRONG & DURABLE PLASTIC CONSTRUCTION: Each wall anchor is crafted from high-strength, impact-resistant plastic designed to deliver maximum holding power and stability. Suitable for brick, concrete, plaster, and drywall, these anchors provide a secure and long-lasting grip that prevents screws from loosening or slipping over time. Built to handle heavy loads and frequent use, they ensure a firm, damage-free installation for both light fixtures and heavier wall-mounted objects.

COLOUR-CODED FOR EASY IDENTIFICATION: Features a smart colour-coded design that allows you to easily identify different sizes at a glance — no more guessing or sorting through mismatched pieces. Each colour corresponds to a specific anchor size, helping you pick the right one quickly for any task. The neatly organized pack keeps all wall plugs secure, tidy, and within reach, making your DIY or professional projects faster and more efficient.

RELIABLE GRIP FOR MULTIPLE SURFACES: Provides a tight, secure fit for various screw types and wall materials — including brick, concrete, plasterboard, and drywall. Designed for light and heavy-duty applications, these wall plugs ensure superior stability and precision every time. Whether you’re mounting furniture, installing shelves, hanging mirrors, or fixing décor pieces, they deliver dependable support that keeps everything firmly in place without wobbling or loosening over time.

ESSENTIAL FOR DIY & PROFESSIONAL USE: A must-have for homeowners, DIY enthusiasts, handymen, and tradespeople, this versatile wall plug assortment is ideal for any job — from small home repairs to large-scale installations. The compact and organized case ensures easy access and tidy storage, keeping your workspace clutter-free. Blackspur 100pc Wall Anchor Set helps you stay prepared for every task, making it an indispensable addition to any home or professional toolkit.
description: Keep your DIY and professional projects securely in place with the Blackspur 100pc Wall Anchor Set, a reliable and practical solution for all your fixing needs. Designed for strength, durability, and ease of use, this comprehensive set includes wall plugs in various sizes to accommodate different screw types and wall materials — from brick and plaster to concrete and drywall. Each anchor is made from high-quality, heavy-duty plastic, engineered to provide firm and lasting support for screws, ensuring a tight and dependable grip. Whether you’re hanging shelves, installing cabinets, or mounting wall décor, these wall plugs help distribute the load evenly, preventing cracking, loosening, or damage to your walls over time. For convenience, the colour-coded design allows for easy identification of sizes, saving time and effort during projects. The organized packaging keeps all 100 pieces neatly arranged and accessible, so you can find the right size whenever you need it.Ideal for both DIY enthusiasts and professional tradespeople, the Blackspur Wall Anchor Set offers the reliability you can trust in every job. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, these anchors deliver long-lasting performance in various environments, making them a must-have in any toolbox. Whether you’re working on home improvement, repairs, or installations, this set ensures every screw stays firmly in place. Compact, organized, and versatile — it’s the ultimate choice for precision and convenience.
